title: U.S. Invasive Watch
subtitle: Common invaders, checked carefully
learning_goal: Learn that invasive status is regional and that identification needs careful evidence.
intro: Some species spread aggressively in parts of the U.S. Find three from this starter watchlist and photograph enough detail to check the ID.
outro: You practiced careful invasive-species reporting without guessing beyond the evidence.

steps.hint: Tree-of-heaven, garlic mustard, Amur honeysuckle, kudzu, and purple loosestrife are examples.
Only log what iNaturalist identifies confidently. Invasive status depends on where you are.
